chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1087 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 30.11.2023 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Tariq hameed Qureshi, Advocate for respondent No.7. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mehboob Ali Siyal, Secretary Local Government Board is present and undertakes that within a week or two, the remaining amount, which is almost Rs.2,00,000/-, in respect of pensionary benefits, would be paid to the petitioner. Accordingly, the petition is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
